design_notes.value_system: Every material has a value (1-3). Recipes require a minimum total value from selected cards. Players combine any materials to meet the threshold - category matching still required but value replaces rarity.
design_notes.deck_structure: 16 cards per zone: 9x value-1, 4x value-2, 1x value-3, 2x hazard (hazards have no value and trigger immediately on draw)
design_notes.food_philosophy: Direct food is weak (value 1 only). Real nutrition comes from prepared tools like traps, fishing poles, and cooking setups.
design_notes.water_philosophy: All collected water is unsafe by default. Must be treated via fire or filtration craft before safe consumption.
design_notes.hazard_philosophy: Hazards reward preparation. Each has a protection condition that reduces or negates the effect.

forest.name: Forest
forest.opportunity: Bow and snare use, rare herbs

cards.name: Fallen Branch
cards.description: Dry and workable. Basic shelter framing or kindling.

cards.name: Dry Leaves
cards.description: Loose insulation and reliable tinder.

cards.name: Pine Needles
cards.description: Dense ground cover. Tinder and bedding insulation.

cards.name: Tree Bark
cards.description: Strip and split for rough cordage or shelter skin.

cards.name: Vine
cards.description: Flexible and strong enough to bind a frame.

cards.name: Wild Herbs
cards.description: Medicinal ingredient. Weak alone, essential in medicine crafts.

cards.name: Berries
cards.description: Emergency food only. +1 Hunger if consumed. Risk of misidentification.

cards.name: Grubs
cards.description: Unpleasant but safe protein. +1 Hunger if consumed.

cards.name: Sap
cards.description: Flammable and sticky. Weak fire starter but available.

cards.name: Thick Log
cards.description: Dense timber. Long burn fire or solid shelter wall section.

cards.name: Straight Sapling
cards.description: Clean shaft for tool handles, poles, or weapon blanks.

cards.name: Medicinal Moss
cards.description: Potent healing material. Key component in medicine crafts.

cards.name: Dry Fungus
cards.description: Catches spark reliably. Best basic fire starter in the forest.

cards.name: Hardwood Bough
cards.description: Dense and flexible. Required for bow crafting. Hard to find.

cards.name: Animal Attack
cards.description: A predator charges. -2 Morale. If no shelter in tableau: also -1 Hunger.
cards.protection: Shelter in tableau reduces to -1 Morale only.

cards.name: Poison Forage
cards.description: You almost consume something dangerous. -1 Morale, -1 Hunger. Forager character: negated.
cards.protection: Forager character passive negates this entirely.

cards.name: Unsafe Water
cards.description: Collected from the river. Must be treated before safe drinking. Raw consume: +1 Hydration but triggers illness risk.

cards.name: Unsafe Water
cards.description: Collected from the river. Must be treated before safe drinking. Raw consume: +1 Hydration but triggers illness risk.

cards.name: Reeds
cards.description: Tall and fibrous. Shelter thatching, basket weaving, or filtration material.

cards.name: River Stone
cards.description: Smooth and dense. Fire ring construction or basic tool blank.

cards.name: Sand
cards.description: Fine-grained. Filtration layer in water purification crafts.

cards.name: Mud
cards.description: Wet and workable. Shelter insulation or gap sealing.

cards.name: Cattails
cards.description: Edible base, cordage, tinder. Low value but versatile.

cards.name: Small Fish
cards.description: Caught by hand or improvised. +1 Hunger raw. Much better cooked.

cards.name: Crayfish
cards.description: Easy to catch in shallows. +1 Hunger raw.

cards.name: Clay
cards.description: Moldable and heat resistant. Container crafting and shelter sealing.

cards.name: Flat Stone
cards.description: Natural cooking surface. Needed for stone cooking setups.

cards.name: Large Fish
cards.description: Significant catch. +2 Hunger raw, +5 Hunger cooked.

cards.name: Smooth Stone
cards.description: Dense and rounded. Grinding tool blank or weighted construction.

cards.name: Flint
cards.description: Reliable spark and sharp edge. Best fire starter in the game. Required for advanced cutting tools.

cards.name: Flash Flood
cards.description: Water surges without warning. Discard 1 random card from hand. -1 Morale.
cards.protection: No full protection. Pathfinder passive reduces discard to optional.

cards.name: Waterborne Illness
cards.description: Contamination in the water. Sets illness flag: next unsafe water consumed deals -3 Hydration and -2 Morale.
cards.protection: Water Filter or Boiling Setup in tableau: negated entirely.

meadow.name: Meadow
meadow.identity: Open ground, fibers, small game, medicinal plants
meadow.opportunity: Snare placement, herb gathering, beeswax, feathers

cards.name: Wild Grass
cards.description: Abundant cordage and weaving material. Weak but everywhere.

cards.name: Dry Soil
cards.description: Fire pit base and shelter floor material.

cards.name: Dandelion
cards.description: Safe and common. +1 Hunger. Weak emergency food.

cards.name: Clover
cards.description: Safe and common. +1 Hunger.

cards.name: Insects
cards.description: Protein in a pinch. +1 Hunger.

cards.name: Thistle
cards.description: Tough fibrous plant. Useful in medicine and cordage.

cards.name: Nettle
cards.description: Stings raw but produces strong processed cordage.

cards.name: Sunlight
cards.description: Open sky exposure. Consume to shift Warmth +2.

cards.name: Feathers
cards.description: Light insulation. Used in bedding and arrow fletching.

cards.name: Beeswax
cards.description: Waterproofing and candle material. Key in weatherproofing crafts.

cards.name: Medicinal Root
cards.description: Potent healing base. Required for strong medicine crafts.

cards.name: Wild Onion
cards.description: +1 Hunger raw. Adds cook bonus to any meal it is paired with.

cards.name: Snare Bait
cards.description: Used with a Snare craft at the meadow. Required to activate trap.

cards.name: Honeycomb
cards.description: Dense and sweet. +3 Hunger, +1 Morale if consumed directly.

cards.name: Bee Sting
cards.description: Painful and distracting. -1 Morale, -1 Warmth.
cards.protection: No protection available. Minor and unavoidable.

cards.name: Wrong Plant
cards.description: Accidental consumption of a harmful plant. -1 Morale, -2 Hunger. Forager: negated.
cards.protection: Forager character passive negates this entirely.

highground.name: High Ground
highground.identity: Visibility, stone, rescue signaling, wind exposure

cards.name: Loose Rock
cards.description: Rough and angular. Basic tool blank or construction fill.

cards.name: Gravel
cards.description: Fine stone. Filtration and drainage layer in water crafts.

cards.name: Lichen
cards.description: Slow food, always available. +1 Hunger.

cards.name: Exposed Root
cards.description: Tough and fibrous. Strong cordage material.

cards.name: Dense Shrub
cards.description: Windbreak and rough shelter wall material.

cards.name: Wind
cards.description: Biting exposure. Shifts Warmth -2 immediately on draw.

cards.name: Visibility
cards.description: Clear sightlines. Consume for +1 Rescue progress.

cards.name: Animal Track
cards.description: Fresh sign of game nearby. Draw 1 bonus food card on your next turn.

cards.name: Flat Rock Shelf
cards.description: Natural platform. Cooking surface or shelter floor base.

cards.name: Quartz
cards.description: Reliable spark source. Solid mid-tier fire starter.

cards.name: Signal Rock Pile
cards.description: Arranged stones visible from distance. +2 Rescue on consume.

cards.name: Cave Entrance
cards.description: Natural shelter. Immediately acts as a Lean-To without crafting.

cards.name: Obsidian Shard
cards.description: Razor sharp. Cutting tool blank and precision craft material.

cards.name: Rescue Signal Site
cards.description: Ideal high-visibility location. +4 Rescue on consume. Required for Signal Kit activation.

cards.name: Rockslide
cards.description: Rocks give way underfoot. Discard 1 card from hand. -1 Morale.
cards.protection: Pathfinder passive: choose which card to discard instead of random.

cards.name: Exposure
cards.description: Wind and cold combine. Warmth shifts -2 immediately. -1 Morale.
cards.protection: Shelter in tableau reduces Warmth loss to -1 only.
